name: Cornsticks (Dupree)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup melted shortening or vegetable oil
2 cups self-rising cornmeal or cornmeal mix
1 1/2 teaspoons cracked fennel seed or cumin seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Pour the shortening into a cast-iron cornstick mold or 10-inch skillet and place the mold in the hot oven.
3. In a bowl, combine the self-rising cornmeal or mix with milk and beaten egg. Add fennel seed and pepper, stirring until thoroughly blended.
4. Mix in the hot shortening from the mold into the batter.
5. Pour the batter into the mold.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until done.
7. Serve piping hot with butter.
